---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Bosutinib (As Monohydrate) 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Bosutinib (As Monohydrate)</strong> 目前有 <strong>31 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Bosutinib (As Monohydrate) 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Bosulif is indicated for the treatment of:• Adult and paediatric patients aged 6 years and older with newly-diagnosed (ND) chronic phase (CP) Philadelphia chromosome-positive chronic myelogenous...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>myeloid leukemia（98.8%）</li>
<li>thrombocytopenia（98.6%）</li>
<li>marcothrombocytopenia with mitral valve insufficiency（98.5%）</li>
<li>hereditary thrombocytopenia with normal platelets（98.5%）</li>
<li>transient neonatal thrombocytopenia（98.3%）</li>
<li>dense granule disease（98.3%）</li>
<li>platelet storage pool deficiency（97.4%）</li>
<li>plasma cell myeloma（96.8%）</li>
<li>HER2 positive breast carcinoma（96.7%）</li>
<li>indolent plasma cell myeloma（96.5%）</li>
<li>thrombotic disease（96.1%）</li>
<li>female breast carcinoma（96.0%）</li>
<li>primary cutaneous T-cell lymphoma（95.6%）</li>
<li>malignant catarrh（95.4%）</li>
<li>infectious bovine rhinotracheitis（95.4%）</li>
<li>cytomegalovirus infection（95.4%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor negative breast cancer（95.3%）</li>
<li>progesterone-receptor positive breast cancer（95.2%）</li>
<li>normal breast-like subtype of breast carcinoma（95.2%）</li>
<li>breast tumor luminal A or B（95.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/bosutinib-as-monohydrate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
